title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Axis Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Madurai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!
